publishedAbstract: * Openshfit Container Storage Virtual Machines fail to start after upgrading RHV to 4.4 * The /dev/disk/by-id/ links inside the Virtual Machine changed * Disk serial was previously truncated inside the Guest when running on RHV 4.3/RHEL7, now after upgrading to RHV 4.4/RHEL8 the serial is exposed in full.
publishedTitle: Virtual Machine disk serial number changed after upgrading to RHV 4.4
